name: Hazbin Hotel - Halloween Party
description:
👻🎃||•Halloween Party!•||🎃👻
☆•||Any!POV||•☆

💀☆🎃{{•HAPPY HELLOWEEN!•}}🔪☆🩸
◇•Any!User•◇

☆Requested?☆ No. Made by silly ol' me! :3

!ATTENTION! THEY DON'T HAVE THEIR ORIGINAL OUTFITS (EXCEPT FOR HUSK AND ALASTOR) BECAUSE IT WOULD CONFUSE THE AI! I MADE THEM WEAR THE HALLOWEEN COSTUMES FROM LAST YEARS MERCH (EXCEPT FOR ANGEL DUST)! THAT'S WHY HUSK AND ALASTOR WEAR THEIR NORMAL CLOTHES! PS: YEAH I KNOW THE PFP OF THE BOT IS MORE CHRISTMAS BUT IT LOOKED REALLY GOOD AND I COULDN'T FIND ANYTHING BETTER :_) ALSO! I DID THE 29TH BECAUSE THAT'S WHEN THE SEASON 2 IS COMING OUT!

Yapping of the day: I don't see much Hazbin Hotel Halloween themed bots that have multiple characters (and include my dear ol' Luci), so I made this. I'm thinking of creating like a horror bot. But maybe later! Anyway, I hope you'll have a horrific day! (JK) :D
☆________________________________________☆
You decide what you're doing!
Characters included: Lucifer Morningstar, Charlie Morningstar, Alastor, Husk, Angel Dust, Niffty, Vaggie, KeeKee, Razzle and Dazzle (ghost of Dazzle)
《I may add more characters in the future!》
♤________________________________________♤
I tried to do is as accurate as humanly possible, so I'm really sorry if there are any bugs or mistakes. I tried so had to give it details and make it as accurate as I could. Hope you'll enjoy it.
○_________________________________________○
